sentaurus.removeEnvironmentVariables: Sentaurus: Search and Remove Environment Variables
config.definitionMaxWidth.description: Max characters per line in user-defined variable/function hover. Set to 0 to disable truncation.
config.RW.mdDesc:
Prefix for **Refinement Evaluation Window**.

Affects:
- `Doping > Const-box` â†’ `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Doping > Gauss` â†’ `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Doping > Submesh` â†’ `sdedr:define-refeval-window`
- `Meshing > Ref-box` â†’ `sdedr:define-refeval-window`

config.CPM.desc: Prefix for Constant Profile Material/Region placement.

config.envVars.mdDesc:
SWB pre-injected environment variable whitelist. Key = variable name, value = hover doc (leave empty for name-only). Changes take effect immediately.

[Add Environment Variables](command:sentaurus.addEnvironmentVariables) | [Search & Remove](command:sentaurus.removeEnvironmentVariables) | [Export](command:sentaurus.exportEnvironmentVariables) | [Import](command:sentaurus.importEnvironmentVariables)
semanticToken.sectionName: SDEVICE top-level section name (e.g. File, Plot)
semanticToken.subSection: SDEVICE Solve sub-section name (e.g. Quasistationary, Coupled, Transient)
